ddls:
CREATE TABLE "portfolio_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the portfolio entry */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the stock in the portfolio as of the date */,
  "shares_out" REAL /* Shares outstanding of the stock as of the date */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the stock as of the date */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "ticker_1" TEXT /* Secondary ticker symbol (if applicable) */,
  "exchange_code" TEXT /* Exchange code where the stock is listed */,
  "security_type" INTEGER /* Type of security (e.g., Common Stock) */,
  "market_sector" INTEGER /* Market sector of the stock (e.g., Equity) */,
  "figi" TEXT /* Financial Instrument Global Identifier (FIGI) */,
  "figi_composite" TEXT /* Composite FIGI identifier */,
  "share_class" TEXT /* Share class identifier */,
  "unique_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the stock */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the entry belongs to */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is denominated */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last update time for the entry */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., internal, external API) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_entries_ticker FOREIGN KEY ("ticker") REFERENCES companies ("ticker"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_entries_security_type FOREIGN KEY ("security_type") REFERENCES security_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_entries_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_entries_market_sector FOREIGN KEY ("market_sector") REFERENCES market_sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_entries_exchange_code FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_code") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the exchange is located */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the exchange */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the security type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the security type */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the security type */,
  "default_currency" TEXT /* Default currency for the security type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the market sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market sector */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the market sector */,
  "average_performance" REAL /* Average performance of the sector */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the sector data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Chief Executive Officer of the company */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the company was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the company data */,
  "company_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time for the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for the user in JSON format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the entry */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the entry was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the entry */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access event */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES portfolio_entries ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio version */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the portfolio version */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the portfolio */,
  "num_entries" INTEGER /* Number of entries in the portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_versions_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client who owns the portfolio */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the portfolio (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the portfolio */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the portfolio */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments for the portfolio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the client */,
  "account_manager" TEXT /* Name of the account manager assigned to the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the client */,
  "total_investment" REAL /* Total investment value for the client */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update time for the client data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)
